Package com.gpudb.protocol

Class CreateUserInternalRequest.Options

java.lang.Object
com.gpudb.protocol.CreateUserInternalRequest.Options
Enclosing class:
CreateUserInternalRequest
public static final class CreateUserInternalRequest.Options extends Object
A set of string constants for the CreateUserInternalRequest parameter options.

Optional parameters.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    ACTIVATED
    Is the user allowed to login.
    static final String
    CREATE_HOME_DIRECTORY
    When TRUE, a home directory in KiFS is created for this user.
    static final String
    DEFAULT_SCHEMA
    Default schema to associate with this user.
    static final String
    DIRECTORY_DATA_LIMIT
    The maximum capacity to apply to the created directory if CREATE_HOME_DIRECTORY is TRUE.
    static final String
    FALSE
     
    static final String
    RESOURCE_GROUP
    Name of an existing resource group to associate with this user.
    static final String
    TRUE

  • Field Details

    • ACTIVATED

      public static final String ACTIVATED
      Is the user allowed to login. Supported values:
      • TRUE: User may login.
      • FALSE: User may not login.
      The default value is TRUE.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • TRUE

      public static final String TRUE
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • FALSE

      public static final String FALSE
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CREATE_HOME_DIRECTORY

      public static final String CREATE_HOME_DIRECTORY
      When TRUE, a home directory in KiFS is created for this user. Supported values:
      • TRUE
      • FALSE
      The default value is TRUE.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEFAULT_SCHEMA

      public static final String DEFAULT_SCHEMA
      Default schema to associate with this user.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DIRECTORY_DATA_LIMIT

      public static final String DIRECTORY_DATA_LIMIT
      The maximum capacity to apply to the created directory if CREATE_HOME_DIRECTORY is TRUE. Set to -1 to indicate no upper limit. If empty, the system default limit is applied.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • RESOURCE_GROUP

      public static final String RESOURCE_GROUP
      Name of an existing resource group to associate with this user.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
